Uses of Package
com.saperion.settings

Packages that use com.saperion.settings
Package
Description
com.saperion.connector
This package contains the main classic connector classes.
com.saperion.connector.rmi
Package for connector RMI client classes.
com.saperion.operations
This package defines the different operations, that can be invoked by rmi.
com.saperion.rmi.common
This package contains the classes for the LARIX RMI Server.
com.saperion.settings
Package for navigation component classes.
  • Classes in com.saperion.settings used by com.saperion.connector
    Class
    Description
    Setting
    A setting that is stored in the database.
    SettingSearchInfo
    Defines how to search for a setting.
    SettingSearchResult
    Represents the result of a search for settings.
    SystemFileKind
    This enumeration holds the types of system files in a Saperion system.
